steps.title: Use the hybrid clue
steps.content: The passage says Danza Azteca became a hybrid dance form. A hybrid results when different traditions blend together, so the blank should describe the Chichimeca Jonaz traditions mixing with those of other tribes.

steps.title: Avoid weaker relationships
steps.content: Choice A means yielded to, which suggests submission rather than blending. Choice C means matched or corresponded, not mixed. Choice D means supported or argued for, which does not create a hybrid. The remaining phrase expresses active mixing. The answer is B.
